race.comment: Very tough. CINTURATO (4) is interestingly untested on rain-affected going but comes here through some top races, sticking on well behind the smart Satirically at Sandown Lakeside last time, sent around $11 in a rich Vobis race won by Salty Pearl two back. Mott can roll forward here and take catching. CELIBATE (3) also tackled the Vobis Guineas two back and beat CINTURATO home at big odds. Too bad to be true last time when dropping right out but must respect the local yard and he did win his only run here. DANZSIN (2) won well first up at Stawell and will have been targeting this race. They'll need the inside ground to hold up. MORGANA (7) has been in good races of late and should be strong late back in trip.

Live1.SchedulerNote: *P1 [Provincial] Warrnambool May Racing Carnival - Prize Money: $50,000
